2026) to exclude companies from its Global Investable Market Indexes whose business model is primarily a digital-asset treasury. Estimates suggest MSTR could see $3b in passive fund outflows if removed from MSCI indices, and $9b if other indices follow suit. Kliff Notes Interesting event-driven

Growth regime upshift: YoY growth moved to +2.7% to +11.9% YoY (baseline median -1.9% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

Strategy is an optionality / levered name: a small but cash-generative analytics business plus a massive, continuously growing bitcoin stack financed by convertibles and preferreds. Marvin’s software-only owner-cash path (~$0.26 to $0.65 per share normalized) cannot justify the equity price; the investment case lives i

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: mNAV compression combined with dilution from convertibles and perpetual preferred issuance while BTC marks reverse.
Mark volatility: Q1 2026 unrealized loss $14.5B on one quarter’s BTC move (10-Q).
Liquidity / refinancing: $8.2B+ debt maturities concentrated years 2–3 (10-Q debt table).
